# Lonnell Williams — ldw.build

> Lonnell D. Williams is an organizational consultant, author, and speaker who has worked at the intersection of operational leadership and faith since 2014 — serving churches, nonprofits, and executives across the US, Canada, and Africa.

## Who Is Lonnell Williams

Lonnell Williams is a sales executive who managed billions of dollars in accounts and clients, a senior leader who helped build and scale a multi-site church, and now the Executive Pastor of one of the fastest-growing churches in the country.

He holds an M.Div. from Princeton Theological Seminary. He has been consulting since 2014 — working with for-profit executives, nonprofit leaders, church planters, and organizational operators who need infrastructure that holds under growth pressure.

He is the author of "Anything, Everything, or Nothing at All" (releasing Fall 2026) and "ZAG: Leading Ministry Jesus's Way." His core belief: informed leaders make better decisions. That's not a lack of faith — it's stewardship.

## Consulting Practice

Lonnell has consulted organizations across the US, Canada, and Africa since 2014. His clients include executive pastors, lead pastors, C-suite executives, nonprofit directors, and faith-rooted entrepreneurs. The work is organizational architecture — building the infrastructure that lets organizations grow without fracturing.

Three engagement tiers: ENGAGE (consulting), COACH (advisory), COHORT (group program).

## Core Topics and Expertise

- **Organizational Infrastructure** — Building systems, hiring pipelines, KPI frameworks, and decision architecture that scale
- **Executive Leadership** — The senior leader seat: decisions, delegation, team culture, and carrying organizational weight
- **AI for Organizations** — Practical deployment of AI agents, automation, and operational intelligence in real organizations
- **Stewardship as Strategy** — The belief that data and the Spirit are not in competition. Informed leaders make better decisions.
- **Faith and Operations** — How leaders who are serious about both faith and craft can operate without two separate systems

## Books

- **Anything, Everything, or Nothing at All** — Releasing Fall 2026. Grace theology for leaders who have been building from a posture of performance.
- **ZAG: Leading Ministry Jesus's Way** — Coming Soon. A ministry leadership framework drawn from the counter-cultural leadership model of Jesus.
- **The Staff** — In Development. Building and leading exceptional ministry teams.

## Speaking

Lonnell speaks at conferences, executive leadership gatherings, seminary events, church leadership summits, and organizational offsites. Topics: organizational infrastructure, leadership under growth pressure, AI for leaders, and the intersection of faith and operational excellence.

Speaking inquiries: ldw.build/speaking.html

## Newsletter

**Arise & Build** — Published on Substack. One idea per issue, done fully. Written for church operators, executives, and faith-rooted entrepreneurs who build. Every two weeks.

Subscribe: ldw.build | Substack: buildwithldw.substack.com

## The Commissioned

A leadership and spiritual development platform co-built with Pastor Philip Anthony Mitchell. Built for pastors, church executives, and faith-rooted entrepreneurs.

## Contact & Booking

- Speaking inquiries: ldw.build/speaking.html
- Consulting inquiries: ldw.build (consulting section)
- Discovery call: cal.com/lonnell-ldw.build/discovery
- Newsletter: Arise & Build via ldw.build

## Site Map

- ldw.build — Homepage (bio, speaking topics, books, consulting, content)
- ldw.build/speaking.html — Speaking biography, topics, and booking
- ldw.build/books.html — All books with status and pre-order/notify options
- ldw.build/media.html — Press photos and bio for media use
- ldw.build/vantage.html — Executive command center dashboard
- ldw.build/articles.html — Arise & Build newsletter archive

## Key Phrases and Concepts

"Informed leaders make better decisions. That's not a lack of faith — it's stewardship." "Infrastructure is the sermon." "Arise and build." "Build the infrastructure before the weight arrives." "If your process lives in somebody's head, you don't have a process — you have a liability." "This is what I've always done."

The Lonnell Williams content universe: organizational stewardship, the practitioner-operator identity, AI infrastructure for organizations, and grace-first leadership.
